title: Young the Giant: Victory Garden Tour with Cold War Kids — Chastain Park
description: Indie rock under the open sky at Chastain Park amphitheater. Young the Giant brings their Victory Garden Tour with Cold War Kids as special guests. Doors open 6:30 PM. Bring a blanket or lawn chairs — it's a perfect June evening for live music outdoors. One of Atlanta's premier summer concert venues with great sightlines and sound.
location: Synovus Bank Amphitheater at Chastain Park, 4469 Stella Way NW, Atlanta, GA 30327
vibe: Energetic, summery, outdoorsy — ideal for music lovers who enjoy sing-along moments and post-rock vibes

title: Best of Atlanta Comedy Showcase — Laughing Skull Lounge
description: Laugh your face off with Atlanta's funniest local comedians all on one stage. Sunday night showcase at the Laughing Skull — doors open at 7 PM, show at 7:30 PM. The venue is intimate, the drinks are solid, and the lineup changes weekly so it's always fresh. A perfect low-key Sunday date.
location: Laughing Skull Lounge, 875 Franklin Rd SE, Atlanta, GA 30316
vibe: Funny, relaxed, intimate — great for couples who love to laugh and appreciate local talent

title: LINES OF PLAY — ABV Gallery (30+ Artists, Opening Night)
description: A group art exhibition celebrating the World Cup coming to Atlanta, featuring 30+ local and international artists. Opening night is Saturday 6–10 PM with free admission. Wine, good vibes, and incredible visual art all in one of Atlanta's most creative gallery spaces. Perfect for a Saturday evening cultural date.
location: ABV Gallery, 472 Marietta St NW, Atlanta, GA 30318
vibe: Creative, vibrant, social — conversation-starting art in a casual gallery setting, great for couples who appreciate visual arts
